Casper._cosign: The owner co-signs material proposals in their own browser wallet (CSPR.click). The server builds the UNSIGNED approve_material tx and never holds the owner key. The settings below only enable a server-key fallback for local dev.

_note: value_cap, paused, per-validator cap, free balance, committed stake, bond and next_proposal_id are all read from chain (ChainReader) — not config.

Dashboard._csprClickAppId: Register an app at https://console.cspr.click and put its appId here. 'csprclick-template' is CSPR.click's public demo appId — fine for local testing, replace for production.
